# MADS Capstone Projects by Subject Area

A minimal public dataset of University of Michigan Master of Applied Data Science (MADS) capstone projects, labeled by subject area. Built by a student, not UMSI. CC0 licensed. No individual identifiers.

Posting in the `#mads-capstone-gallery` Slack channel is mandatory for MADS capstone completers (confirmed by a MADS lecturer on April 22, 2026). This dataset therefore approximates the full population of capstones completed since the channel opened on May 17, 2025, rather than a self selected sample. Capstones shared in the program's prior Coursera communication space are not yet included; contributions with historical data are welcome.

Each row is one capstone project. Fields: cohort (SS25, F25, W26), team_number, project_title, team_size, subject_category, and four boolean presence flags (has_report, has_video, has_code_repo, has_live_app). Data lives on the `main` branch and is regenerated automatically when the CSV is updated.

## Data

- [CSV](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/quietnotion/mads-capstone-dataset/main/data/mads_capstone_projects_by_subject_area.csv): canonical dataset, UTF-8.
- [JSON](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/quietnotion/mads-capstone-dataset/main/data/mads_capstone_projects_by_subject_area.json): same content as an array of objects, booleans and integers typed.
- [Chart PNG](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/quietnotion/mads-capstone-dataset/main/chart.png): stacked bar chart by cohort.

## Docs

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/quietnotion/mads-capstone-dataset/main/README.md): overview, privacy stance, how to use.
- [Taxonomy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/quietnotion/mads-capstone-dataset/main/taxonomy.md): subject category definitions and every judgment call made.
- [Contributing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/quietnotion/mads-capstone-dataset/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): how to propose changes, add cohorts, or request redaction.

## Repo

- [Repository](https://github.com/quietnotion/mads-capstone-dataset)
- [Issues](https://github.com/quietnotion/mads-capstone-dataset/issues)
- [Discussions](https://github.com/quietnotion/mads-capstone-dataset/discussions)

## Optional

- [UMSI MADS program page](https://www.si.umich.edu/programs/master-applied-data-science): the official source for program information.
- [UMSI Project Exposition](https://www.si.umich.edu/about-umsi/news/2025-umsi-student-project-exposition-award-winners-announced): where capstone work is celebrated publicly with team names and titles.
